harness_id.description: Harness the session is bound to.

native_session_id.description: The vendor CLI session id (codex thread id / claude session uuid / ...); null when none exists.

resume_kind.description: How the session can be continued on its native CLI: resume_by_id when a native session id exists, none otherwise.

last_observed_model.description: Model last observed on the session's stream.

state.description: Vendor session cache state: live (resumable), stale, or rebound (re-hosted elsewhere).

updated_at.description: When the session was last updated.

Session.description: A re-hostable pointer to one harness's native CLI session for a thread — a cache, not the source of truth.
